name: combo-meter
hypothesis: A combo meter (x1, x2, x3, x5) appears top-right after the 1st player hit. Each consecutive hit within 2s raises the multiplier; damage scales x1.0 / x1.5 / x2.0 / x3.0. A 'xN COMBO!' praise float pops on level-up. Combo resets after >2s idle or on fail/forcewin entry. Target metric: depth perception / mechanic clarity.
diff_from_baseline: playable/combo_meter.js (new): state, level-up logic, golden-badge meter rendering
scene_exterior/index.js: import combo + praise; in _impactEnemy multiply dmg by getComboMultiplier(), record hit, spawn combo praise on level-up
playable/script.js: drawComboMeter in _paintOverlay (tutorial/freeplay only); resetCombo on fail/forcewin entry
review_notes: Axis respected (mechanic). Bundle contains COMBO/recordHit/getComboMultiplier tokens (3 matches vs 0 in baseline). Thumbnail shows interior aim phase (combo meter only after first hit, per hypothesis). Bundle 2.96 MB. No regression markers.
